segments.title: Allow modification of response status and headers
segments.summary: The PR proposes allowing modification of the response status and headers to unblock a developer. This is presented as a quicker alternative to refactoring `renderToString` and `renderToStream`. The author also suggests renaming the request info object and changing how headers are set.
decisions: Propose allowing response status and headers to be modified.

segments.title: Noted type mismatch for Document in worker.tsx
segments.summary: A reviewer noted a type mismatch for the `Document` component in `worker.tsx`. They concluded it was an indirect consequence of the PR's changes, which now allowed an element to be returned from an interruptor. The decision was to merge the current PR and tackle the type issue in a subsequent effort.
actions: justinvdm: look at this type issue next.
decisions: Merge the PR and address the `worker.tsx` type issue separately.

segments.title: Release announcement for v0.2.0-alpha.2 and v0.1.29
segments.summary: The changes from this PR were included in releases `v0.2.0-alpha.2` and `v0.1.29` of the `redwoodjs/sdk`.
decisions: Released changes in v0.2.0-alpha.2 and v0.1.29.
